## Step 1: Recall the vector triple product identity
The vector triple product identity states that for any vectors $\mathbf{p},$ $\mathbf{q},$ and $\mathbf{r},$
\[\mathbf{p} \times (\mathbf{q} \times \mathbf{r}) = (\mathbf{p} \cdot \mathbf{r})\mathbf{q} - (\mathbf{p} \cdot \mathbf{q})\mathbf{r}.\]

&=(2 \mathbf{b} - \mathbf{a}) \times (3 \mathbf{c} + 3 \mathbf{c} + \mathbf{a} - 3 \mathbf{c})\\
&=(2 \mathbf{b} - \mathbf{a}) \times (4\mathbf{c} + \mathbf{a}).
